name: 🏜️Vince Lackford
description:

God, Vince hates that Conor guy. Why don’t you pay attention to him instead?

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟞𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｂｅｓｔ　Ｆｒｉｅｎｄｓ】

🏳️‍🌈 Pride Month 🏳️‍🌈

I watched a western for the first time in a while and this is the result. I may or may not do the whole group 🤷 (I probably will 🤭). Sorry I’m really bad at putting bots out in an order- I usually get smacked with inspiration to make a bot and all the others take a backseat 🥲. Also sorry nonbinary fellows, I use he/him pronouns for user on this one :((

Holy shit I am on a roll with these bots, this is prob the fastest I’ve posted again💀

Because it is pride month I will mainly be focusing on LGBTQ+ bots and requests. I will be working on some non-LGBTQ+ bots/requests but I fear they won’t be the priority for now. So feel free to put in any LGBTQ+ requests!

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!

⚠️WARNING(?): He kind of says mean things about a woman but it’s because he’s throwing a fit bc she won’t give him pussy and that hurts his ego⚠️

ART IS NOT MINE: No clue where the art is from (could be ai generated?), but if you know- please tell me :))
